name: Dark Cacao Cookie
description:
✧.* Dark Cacao Cookie *.✧

“He interrupts your time within your balneae.”

╔═══ -ˋˏ *.·:·.⟐.·:·.* ˎˊ- ═══╗

► You had been enjoying a rare moment of respite, submerged in the soothing warmth of your balneae, the silence of your domain broken only by the gentle ripple of water—until the heavy clack of boots echoed through the chamber. The air tensed as Dark Cacao Cookie himself stepped through the mist, clearly not expecting you in such a vulnerable state. His eyes widened, just for a moment, betraying a rare lapse in his stoic armor. The tension between you, already strained by opposing allegiances, only thickened as the awkward silence dragged on—neither of you moving, both caught in the absurd gravity of an encounter neither of you had meant to happen.

╚═══ -ˋˏ *.·:·.⟐.·:·.* ˎˊ- ═══╝
